title: [KCES] Kiss Character Edit System Repack R2
description:
This repack is based on KCES 1.30.3 (Japanese version).
It has basic English auto translation preloaded.
You need COM3D2 upgraded to COM3D2.5 in order to use this.
It should work with both English and Japanese version of COM3D2.5.
Size after unpacking: 14,8 GB
You can play this as a standalone game if you just want to test the new maid and master editor without upgrading COM3D2.

Basic instructions:

1. Extract with 7zip
2. Run “set_install_directory_CRE.cmd”
3. Run as standalone app from CR Launcher.exe or open the editor in COM3D2.5 by selecting the new high poly body (it still launches as a separate app !).
4. You can convert it to English version by simply unzipping "CR EditSystem\GameData\product.arc" and changing language from ingame settings.
None of the existing COM3D2 mods work with KCES as of this date. It has no mod support whatsoever. Not even an uncensor. In other words, it’s useless.

Seed or you won't see another update. Ever.
